sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36689" key="e)ca/mblwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξάμβλ-ωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n36689.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">abortion,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.51</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
